title: ISic000502. Marcus Paconius constructrs a temple to the Genius of the colonia
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag
1M(arcus) Paconius L(uci) f(ilius) Pomp(tina tribu) Vipsanus Pr[o]culus
2aed(ilis) aed(em) Genio Col(oniae) Aug(ustae) Lilybit(anorum) s(ua) p(ecunia ) f(ecit)

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag
1MPACONIUSLFPOMPVIPSANUSPR[.]CULUS
2AEDAEDGENIOCOLAUGLILYBITSPF

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • text of CIL

English translation

Jonathan Prag

Marcus Paconius Vipsanus Proculus, son of Lucius, of the Pomptina tribe, aedile, constructed a temple for the Genius of the Colonia Augusta Lilybitanorum at his own expense.

commentary

  • Manganaro 1988 44-45, 69 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001427
Line 1 Interlineation line 1 to 2
